hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(tsx|jsx|html|css|scss)$/.test(f)){const c=i.tool_input?.new_string||'';const issues=[];if(/<img(?![^>]*alt=)[^>]*>/i.test(c))issues.push('img 태그에 alt 속성 누락');if(/onClick/.test(c)&&!/onKeyDown|onKeyPress|onKeyUp/.test(c)&&/<div|<span/.test(c))issues.push('클릭 핸들러에 키보드 이벤트 핸들러 누락 (a11y)');if(issues.length){console.error('[A11y Hook] 접근성 경고:');issues.forEach(i=>console.error('  - '+i))}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Auto a11y check: warn about accessibility issues in UI file edits
